zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局延续
zh.content:
当前XRP兑美元价格围绕1.10震荡，日内触及1.10434高点但整体仍处于均线下方，短线偏弱整理结构延续，多空方向尚未明确突破。运行

MACD指标维持负值，动能柱略偏空，显示下行动能仍在但未明显放大；20日均线1.11866形成短期压制，价格持续受制于均线下方运行。

支撑关注1.096及整数关口1.09附近，若失守或将延续回调；上方阻力集中在1.11866与1.13区域，突破需放量确认。

操作上建议维持区间思路，高抛低吸为主，未突破均线前避免追多；若放量站上1.11866，可考虑顺势跟进短多机会注意风险控制

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is currently exhibiting a sideways-to-mildly bearish structure after failing to sustain momentum above its short-term moving average. Price action remains compressed, suggesting consolidation rather than a strong directional trend. Despite a marginal 24-hour gain, the pair continues to trade below the 20-period SMA, indicating sellers still have slight control. Overall, market structure favors caution until a decisive breakout occurs above nearby resistance levels.

Momentum indicators reinforce a weak underlying bias, with MACD remaining in negative territory at -0.0089, signaling continued downside pressure. The absence of a confirmed RSI reading limits overbought/oversold interpretation, but price behavior suggests neutrality leaning bearish. Additionally, trading below the 20-SMA at 1.11866 confirms rejection of short-term bullish attempts, while the flat price structure indicates fading volatility and indecision. This reinforces cautious sentiment.

Key support is established near the session low at 1.09666, a level that has so far contained downside movement and may act as a short-term floor. Below this, psychological support around 1.0900 could come into play if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, immediate resistance is located at the 20-SMA near 1.11866, with stronger resistance around 1.1300 if momentum improves. Volume remains subdued.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy unless a clear breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight risk control, while sellers can look for rejection signals around the 20-SMA resistance zone. A decisive move above resistance would shift bias bullish, whereas a breakdown below support would open room for extended downside continuation. Risk management remains essential in volatile conditions.
